evidence_basis: Claim substantiation, inventory, and assurance evidence
recoding_note: Operational carbon-neutrality claim gives an operations object, target year, compensation logic, and ISO claim evidence.

evidence_basis: Claim substantiation, inventory, and assurance evidence
recoding_note: Product carbon neutrality changes the bound object from operations to product life-cycle.

intervention_logic: Reduction plus market instruments or compensation
secondary_relations: Evidence basis shift; metric basis shift
recoding_note: Scope 1 and 2 narrows the operational claim to a GHG Protocol scope boundary.

evidence_basis: Claim substantiation, inventory, and assurance evidence
recoding_note: Site-level facility neutrality binds a facility boundary rather than general operations.

secondary_relations: Boundary shift possible; evidence basis missing
recoding_note: Claim omits stated scope and evidence, so preservation of the operational boundary cannot be judged.
SBTi net zero preserves value-chain scope, long-term pathway, and validation evidence.
Near-term science-based target is a milestone-based target under SBTi criteria.
Inventory accounting shares emissions context but is not a net-zero target commitment.
Residual-emissions neutralization specifies the residual treatment within a net-zero target.

secondary_relations: Boundary missing; evidence basis missing; temporal baseline missing
recoding_note: Missing baseline and scope prevent judging alignment with SBTi net-zero coverage.
Science-based net-zero target carries SBTi pathway, boundary, and validation semantics.
Sectoral pathway specializes the target pathway and metric basis.
Updated evidence qualifies validation provenance while preserving the same target content.
Target ambition lacks external validation, changing accountability rather than the target content alone.

secondary_relations: Temporal structure shift; evidence basis updated
recoding_note: Prior target is superseded by an approved updated target.

normative_threshold: Taxonomy substantial-contribution, DNSH, and safeguard criteria
evidence_basis: Activity criteria, DNSH, safeguards, and disclosure evidence
sustainability_purpose: Sustainable finance and environmental objective alignment
recoding_note: Taxonomy-aligned activity requires activity-level criteria, DNSH, safeguards, and reporting evidence.

normative_threshold: Taxonomy substantial-contribution, DNSH, and safeguard criteria
evidence_basis: Activity criteria, DNSH, safeguards, and disclosure evidence
sustainability_purpose: Sustainable finance and environmental objective alignment
recoding_note: DNSH compliance is a criterion-level qualification within taxonomy alignment.

normative_threshold: Taxonomy substantial-contribution, DNSH, and safeguard criteria
sustainability_purpose: Sustainable finance and environmental objective alignment
recoding_note: Portfolio-level sustainability changes the claim from activity alignment to financial-portfolio classification.

sustainability_purpose: Sustainable finance and environmental objective alignment
recoding_note: Eligibility indicates taxonomy coverage but does not establish aligned substantial contribution or safeguards.

normative_threshold: Taxonomy substantial-contribution, DNSH, and safeguard criteria
evidence_basis: Activity criteria, DNSH, safeguards, and disclosure evidence
sustainability_purpose: Sustainable finance and environmental objective alignment
recoding_note: Failed do-no-significant-harm safeguards are incompatible with taxonomy-aligned activity.

metric_basis: Repairability, modularity, durability, or circular-design criteria
intervention_logic: Design for repair, reuse, or recycling
recoding_note: Circular product design claim preserves product-design criteria and stewardship evidence.

metric_basis: Use intensity, lifetime extension, or material-loop metrics
recoding_note: Product-service model substitutes a business-model intervention for a product-design claim.
Reusable packaging binds a packaging return loop rather than general circular product design.
Repairability is a more specific circular-design property supported by product documentation.

evidence_basis: Reporting-framework provenance and indicator mapping evidence
recoding_note: Emissions disclosure indicator is a reporting-framework disclosure item with indicator provenance.

evidence_basis: Reporting-framework provenance and indicator mapping evidence
recoding_note: ESRS transition-plan disclosure specializes climate reporting content and assumptions.

evidence_basis: Reporting-framework provenance and indicator mapping evidence
recoding_note: GRI-to-ESRS mapping gives an explicit indicator correspondence and unit mapping.

evidence_basis: Reporting-framework provenance and indicator mapping evidence
recoding_note: Taxonomy KPI disclosure specializes sustainability reporting with taxonomy reporting metrics.

secondary_relations: Metric basis missing; normative threshold missing; evidence basis missing
recoding_note: Climate-neutral KPI label lacks a definition, threshold, and supporting evidence.
